/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/task_worker_test.dir/sync_task_executor_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_worker_test.dir/task_worker_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_worker_test.dir/strand_executor_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_worker_test.dir/task_execution_manager_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_worker_test.dir/metrics_executor_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_worker_test.dir/fork_limit_executor_test.cpp.o -o task_worker_test  ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a ../../../test_doubles/utils/libocudu_gtest_main.a ../../../test_doubles/utils/libtest_rng.a ../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a -lgtest
